allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "d:\\AI" -Recurse -Force | Select-Object FullName, @{Name="Type"; Expression={if \($_.PSIsContainer\) { "DIR" } else { "FILE" }}} | Sort-Object FullName)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "d:\\AI" -Recurse | Where-Object { !$_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object FullName | Sort-Object FullName)
PowerShell(python -c "import json; d = json.load\(open\('d:/AI/extension/manifest.json'\)\); print\('MV:', d['manifest_version']\); print\('Name:', d['name']\); print\('Perms:', d['permissions']\)")
